summary:
A pivotal randomized control trial indicates that epoetin alfa did not reduce mortality or severe neurodevelopmental impairments in preterm infants. Due to inconsistent results across studies—including both neutral effects and reported cognitive benefits—the lack of consensus prevents confirming its neuroprotective effectiveness.

The summary should only contain factual statements based strictly upon what the agent said; avoid adding external information or interpretation beyond their stated content.

Only include facts mentioned within Agent’s own text as part of the final response.

Due to inconsistent results across studies—including both neutral effects and reported cognitive benefits—the lack of consensus prevents confirming its neuroprotective effectiveness.
